news.title: Meet the Acting Office Team & Mission for UK Firms
news.summary:
Kenny brings a rich, well-rounded understanding of the industry and is known for his strategic insight and unparalleled knowledge of its workings.
Beyond his professional life, Kenny is passionate about value investing and supporting business growth, including successfully investing in and producing bespoke malt whiskies.
In his leisure time, Kenny enjoys playing golf, albeit not as proficiently as his other endeavors.
Dave Jangid Director An extraordinary entrepreneur, investor, and champion of innovative change with over two decades of invaluable experience in Accounting and Fintech.
He returns to London from Australia with a wealth of experience in client relationships, professional networking and team management.

news.title: Acting Office Email Formats
news.summary:
About Acting Office At Acting Office we provide a bespoke “one-stop” software solution for medium-sized accounting practices.
Enhance productivity and track billable client hours with extreme accuracy.
Email integration, phone integration, task management, timesheets, deadline reminders, canned messages and data storage all in the one place saves time and money.
Our cloud-based software gives you flexibility and ease of access to work from any location and any device.

news.title: Arihant Mehta - Associate Director at Debitam
news.summary:
Arihant Mehta is a seasoned accounting professional with extensive experience in account management and compliance.
Currently serving as a Senior Account Manager at Acting Office since January 2023, Arihant specializes in optimizing accounting practices through advanced software solutions.
Prior to this role, Arihant held a similar position at Debitam, where services were provided to over 25,000 UK businesses for their annual compliance needs.
Earlier experience includes an Accounting Associate role at Capsitech IT Services and positions as Article Assistant at both Mehta Singhvi & Associates and Chaturvedi & Shah.
Arihant's educational background includes an ATC in Accounting and Business/Management from the Institute of Public Accountants, an ACCA, and a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Jai Narain Vyas University.

news.title: Acting Office helps Caroola Accountancy grow smarter
news.summary:
Growth mode activated by Acting Office What happens when a leading accountancy group partners with Acting Office?
🧩 “It was like plugging in a missing piece of the puzzle.” That’s how Andy and the team at Caroola Accountancy describes their journey with us and we couldn’t be prouder.
In this short video, hear directly from the Caroola leadership on how Acting Office became an extension of their in-house team, helping them scale smarter, not harder.
That’s where we come in seamlessly integrating into your workflows, streamlining internal processes, and giving you the bandwidth to lead, grow, and innovate.
And we needed to do something about that because our whole objective is a business is to grow our market share.

news.title: #fab26 #fab26 #accounting #finance #networking #startups #events #actingoffice #erp
news.summary:
Both events brought together incredible professionals from across the accounting and finance space, and it was a pleasure to be part of such a dynamic environment.
We had some truly insightful conversations, met a wide range of talented individuals, and built valuable new connections along the way.
As Acting Office steps out of stealth mode this year, these exhibitions mark a significant milestone for us.
This is just the beginning; you will be seeing us at many more key events across the accountancy world.
Kenny MacAulay Mohit Baheti Dave Jangid Mark McNee Divyang Singhvi Rishi Ruparelia David Kerr #FAB26 #Accounting #Finance #Networking #Startups #Events #ActingOffice #ERP
